title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: langchain-ai/langchain
summary: LangChain’s Ollama integration lets you call local models through the Ollama REST API inside any LangChain chain or agent.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, pull, push, list and delete models.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; identical capabilities to the JS SDK—chat, stream, embeddings, model ops.

title: ollama-webui
summary: ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama models; supports multi-model chats, code highlighting, RAG, and admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; offers synchronous/asynchronous APIs and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem that wraps the Ollama REST API; chat, generate, pull, list, copy, delete models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI for Ollama with conversation history, markdown rendering, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into the editor as a GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator nodes for building local RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library and Blazor sample for chatting with Ollama models using a clean C# API.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & GPU) and docker-compose snippets for running Ollama server.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and PVC support.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Python repo showing how to build a RAG system with Ollama embeddings and Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that answers questions using local Ollama models and optional slash commands.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an Ollama sidebar for summarizing notes and Q&A without leaving the editor.

title: ollama-ray
summary: Ray Serve example deploying Ollama models for scalable inference across a cluster.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: Logseq plugin that lets you chat with local Ollama models to brainstorm or summarize your graph.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision an Ollama server on AWS EC2 with GPU and model bootstrap.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: FastAPI micro-service that exposes additional endpoints (batch chat, health, metrics) on top of Ollama.
